data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm that some providers work across multiple locations, as stated in the requirement. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the operational status of providers across different locations. The linked use case mentions that Dr. Williams works at multiple locations, but there is no direct evidence or validation that this requirement is satisfied, leading to a gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that some providers work at multiple locations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
